global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and trendy shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting trending content and a sale.

elements.label: Purple abstract background
elements.description: A smooth purple background with abstract shapes creating a modern and vibrant feel.

elements.label: Trendy shapes
elements.description: A large, light-colored rectangle and a circle overlapping, suggesting a dynamic and trendy design.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller, light-colored square positioned within the main subject area, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: A tiny, light-colored oval shape positioned towards the bottom, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending' with a smaller line below it, conveying a sense of urgency.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending New hits every week

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Large, bold text at the top reading 'PulsePlay SALE' in a contrasting color to grab attention.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Learn more' in white, designed to encourage user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular badge in the top corner with the text 'UGC' indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
